parts.prompt:
Find the average number of acres affected by the invasive species from time t = 0 to time
t = 4 weeks. Show the setup for your calculations.

scoring_points.description: See College Board scoring guidelines for part (a)

parts.prompt:
Find the time t when the instantaneous rate of change of C equals the average rate of change
of C over the time interval 0 # t # 4 . Show the setup for your calculations.

scoring_points.description: See College Board scoring guidelines for part (b)

parts.prompt:
Assume that the invasive species continues to spread according to the given model for all
times t > 0. Write a limit expression that describes the end behavior of the rate of change in
the number of acres affected by the species. Evaluate this limit expression.

scoring_points.description: See College Board scoring guidelines for part (c)

parts.prompt:
At time t = 4 weeks after the invasive species appears in the fruit grove, measures are taken
t
to counter the spread of the species. The function A, defined by A t = C t - y 0.1·ln x dx,
_ i _ i 4 _ i
models the number of acres affected by the species over the time interval 4 # t # 36 . At what
time t, for 4 # t # 36 , does A attain its maximum value? Justify your answer.

scoring_points.description: See College Board scoring guidelines for part (d)
